name: First Service Federal Credit Union
description_short: First Service Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving eight Ohio counties with checking, savings, loans, and credit card products.
description_long:
First Service Federal Credit Union is a federally insured credit union operating in Franklin, Fairfield, Delaware, Pickaway, Madison, Morrow, Licking, and Union counties in Ohio. As a credit union, it operates as a member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit institution, which shapes its service philosophy and product offerings. The organization provides comprehensive consumer banking services including deposit accounts, home loans, auto loans, motorsports financing, and a co-branded VISA credit card. Members can access online banking, loan applications, and payment processing through their digital platform at firstcu.com.

First Service offers several distinctive checking and savings products, including a Platinum Checking account with no minimum balance and unlimited transactions. Their loan portfolio features competitive rates, including auto loans from 6.24% APR, motorsports loans from 8.24% APR, 10-year streamline mortgages from 4.875% APR, and VISA cards from 3.99% APR. The credit union provides ancillary member benefits such as cell phone protection up to $800 per claim ($1,600 annually) for qualifying account holders, and a Save to Win program offering quarterly and monthly cash prizes up to $5,000 for savings members. They also partner with LPL Financial for investment services through Seth Currens.

As a credit union, First Service differentiates itself through member-centric governance, with members eligible to vote at annual membership meetings and participate in institutional decisions. The organization emphasizes fraud prevention and security, explicitly warning members about common scams and never initiating calls requesting personal information verification. They provide financial education through their MoneyEdu program with monthly themes addressing credit scores, debt, and spending. The credit union maintains physical branch locations and hours information available online, combining digital accessibility with traditional in-person banking.

First Service is most appropriate for consumers in its eight-county Ohio service area seeking traditional banking products with credit union advantages including member ownership and typically lower fees. The main caveat is geographic limitation—membership and branch access are restricted to residents of their specific Ohio counties. Like all financial institutions, prospective members should verify current rates, fee structures, and eligibility requirements directly, as the website provides featured rates but not comprehensive rate disclosures or detailed fee schedules.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No minimum balance and unlimited transactions on Platinum Checking account
Competitive loan rates including auto loans from 6.24% APR and mortgages from 4.875% APR
Cell phone protection benefit up to $800 per claim included with qualifying checking accounts
Save to Win program offering cash prizes up to $5,000 for savings members
Member-owned credit union structure typically offering lower fees than banks
Federally insured by NCUA providing deposit protection up to standard limits
Partnership with LPL Financial for investment advisory services
cons: Geographic restriction: membership limited to eight specific Ohio counties only
Website lacks comprehensive fee schedule and detailed rate disclosures
Limited information about minimum opening deposits or specific eligibility requirements
No apparent mobile app or fintech features mentioned on website
Featured rates marked with asterisks but 'More Rates' page not accessible from provided content
best_for: Ohio residents in Franklin, Fairfield, Delaware, Pickaway, Madison, Morrow, Licking, or Union counties seeking full-service banking
Borrowers looking for competitive auto and mortgage rates within the service area
Members who value credit union member-ownership and community-focused banking philosophy
Savers interested in prize-linked savings through the Save to Win program
diagnosis: First Service Federal Credit Union is best for Ohio consumers in its eight-county service area seeking traditional banking products with credit union advantages. The primary caveat is strict geographic restriction—the credit union does not serve customers outside its designated counties, making it unsuitable for those outside this region regardless of product quality.
services: Platinum Checking with no minimum balance and unlimited transactions
Home loans and mortgages with rates from 4.875% APR
Auto loans with rates from 6.24% APR
Motorsports financing with rates from 8.24% APR
First Service VISA credit card with rates from 3.99% APR
Online loan applications for multiple loan types
Cell phone protection benefit up to $800 per claim
Save to Win prize-linked savings program
Investment services through LPL Financial partnership
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
